title: Pass 5.A.1 follow-up: pin SSD300 weights (#1099-weights)
description:
Follow-up to #1099 (Pass 5.A.1 closure): SSD300 was added to ferrotorch-hub::registry::MODELS with the all-zero placeholder SHA ("0000…0000"), so `pretrained=true` currently fails fast with a clear error. Pin a real SafeTensors checkpoint from a stable mirror.

Parallel to:
- #456-weights (fasterrcnn_resnet50_fpn placeholder SHA)
- #964-weights (maskrcnn_resnet50_fpn placeholder SHA)
- #457-weights (deeplabv3_resnet50 / fcn_resnet50 placeholder SHAs)

Acceptance:
- HuggingFace mirror at `ferrotorch/ssd300_vgg16/main/model.safetensors` populated with a torchvision-converted SSD300 weight set
- SHA-256 computed and pasted into ferrotorch-hub/src/registry.rs in place of the all-zero placeholder
- Smoke test confirming `vision::get_model("ssd300_vgg16", true, 91)` succeeds end-to-end (gated #[ignore] for network)
